creator: scorpio@drkshdw.org
text:
mixer.app cannot fetch the distfiles. In addition, it's an older version.

Updated from Mixer.app 1.4.1 to 1.6.0

Fix: PORTNAME=      mixer.app
-PORTVERSION=   1.4.1
+PORTVERSION=   1.6.0
 CATEGORIES=    audio
-MASTER_SITES=  http://www.fukt.hk-r.se/~per/mixer/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://www.fukt.bth.se/~per/mixer/
 DISTNAME=      Mixer.app-${PORTVERSION}

 MAINTAINER=    cpiazza@FreeBSD.org
